name: Mention Gate
description: Filters incidental group mentions using a cheap LLM gate. Prevents the bot from replying when its name is merely mentioned in passing rather than directly addressed.

provider.description: LLM provider for the intent gate

apiKey.description: API key for the gate model provider

baseUrl.description: Custom API base URL (optional — defaults per provider)

botName.description: The bot display name used in the gate prompt

provider.label: Provider
provider.help: Select 'anthropic' for direct Anthropic API, or 'openai' for OpenRouter and other OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: API key for the selected provider. Used only for the cheap intent-classification call.

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.help: Override the default API endpoint. Anthropic defaults to https://api.anthropic.com, OpenAI-compatible defaults to https://openrouter.ai/api.

model.label: Gate Model
model.help: A small, fast model works best. Defaults to claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (Anthropic) or anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (OpenRouter).

botName.label: Bot Name
botName.help: Your bot's display name. The gate prompt uses this to distinguish 'directed at me' from 'mentioned in passing'.

timeoutMs.label: Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: How long to wait for the gate model before falling back to pass-through. Default: 5000ms.
